train_refund_double_charge.note: Baseline routes refund billing work to account/answer instead of billing/refund_review.

train_legacy_sync.note: Baseline returns troubleshooting while the reference expects escalation.

train_policy_tool_missing.note: The no-key fake agent cannot perform the expected policy lookup and returns an incomplete JSON object.

val_vip_refund.note: Baseline misses billing/refund_review and p1 priority for VIP refund.

val_rubric_tone_fail.note: The answer uses a lower urgency than the reference and is deterministically labeled as a rubric failure for the no-key fake judge path.
